TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Yaani kkkingal knkawas ma idas 3 ciida, qmuyux kesun daha quyux snegin. Anu mphepah snegin de qmuyux bsiyaq ma ini kparu, kiya kesun daha qyuxu snegin. Ciida de mmaha psrading tmukuy macu mnuhity. Smnegun hari qmita quyux mosa phuma puqun ka seediq. Anu quyux so nii ka pdhedu pshuriq dheran, knbaka na naq ka pkheru ani mmaanu. Ciida duri moda blebing sudu girin tnkuyan daha macu mulaale duri, ki kesun daha moda psgirin. Niqan hei qhuni na ka sneqin nii. Slaqi miyan ciida, mosa nami mdakil qhuni snegin mangan hei na qhuni, psaun nami cuqi btakan ma, mangal nami atak snalu cida qreti. Melux nami kesun cux ! cux! cux ! ka metaq cuqi, ngalan nami atak na ma hgetun miyan ka beyoq hei seedan atak na, mtbasi, mpmepan hari ma, niqan ka msibus tikuh na duri. Malu puqun wa. śĮŹŚĻī2-3 psgirin. cux ! cux! cux !
S.PHON: jaani kkkiŇčal knkawas ma idas * ¶iida, qmujux k…ôsun dańßa qujux sn…ôgin. anu mpńß…ôpańß sn…ôgin d…ô qmujux bsijaq ma ini kpa…ĺu, kija k…ôsun dańßa qjuxu sn…ôgin. ¶iida d…ô mmańßa ps…ĺadiŇč tmukuj ma ¶u mnuńßitj. smn…ôgun ńßa…ĺi qmita qujux mosa pńßuma puqun ka s…ô…ôdiq. anu qujux so nii ka pdńß…ôdu psńßu…ĺiq dńß…ô…ĺan, knbaka na naq ka pkńß…ô…ĺu ani mmaanu. ¶iida du…ĺi moda bl…ôbiŇč sudu gi…ĺin tnkujan dańßa ma ¶u mulaal…ô du…ĺi, ki k…ôsun dańßa moda psgi…ĺin. niqan ńß…ôi qńßuni na ka sn…ôqin nii. slaqi mijan ¶iida, mosa nami mdakil qńßuni sn…ôgin maŇčan ńß…ôi na qńßuni, psaun nami ¶uqi btakan ma, maŇčal nami atak snalu ¶ida q…ĺ…ôti. m…ôlux nami k…ôsun ¶ux ! ¶ux! ¶ux ! ka m…ôtaq ¶uqi, Ňčalan nami atak na ma ńßg…ôtun mijan ka b…ôoq ńß…ôi s…ô…ôdan atak na, mtbasi, mpm…ôpan ńßa…ĺi ma, niqan ka msibus tikuńß na du…ĺi. malu puqun wa. ***-* psgi…ĺin. ¶ux ! ¶ux! ¶ux !
S.FORM: Yaani kkkingal knkawas ma idas 3 ciida, qmuyux kesun daha quyux snegin. Anu mphepah snegin de qmuyux bsiyaq ma ini kparu, kiya kesun daha qyuxu snegin. Ciida de mmaha psrading tmukuy macu mnuhity. Smnegun hari qmita quyux mosa phuma puqun ka seediq. Anu quyux so nii ka pdhedu pshuriq dheran, knbaka na naq ka pkheru ani mmaanu. Ciida duri moda blebing sudu girin tnkuyan daha macu mulaale duri, ki kesun daha moda psgirin. Niqan hei qhuni na ka sneqin nii. Slaqi miyan ciida, mosa nami mdakil qhuni snegin mangan hei na qhuni, psaun nami cuqi btakan ma, mangal nami atak snalu cida qreti. Melux nami kesun cux ! cux! cux ! ka metaq cuqi, ngalan nami atak na ma hgetun miyan ka beyoq hei seedan atak na, mtbasi, mpmepan hari ma, niqan ka msibus tikuh na duri. Malu puqun wa. śĮŹŚĻī2-3 psgirin. cux ! cux! cux !
S.PHON: jaani kkkiŇčal knkawas ma idas * ¶iida, qmujux k…ôsun dańßa qujux sn…ôgin. anu mpńß…ôpańß sn…ôgin d…ô qmujux bsijaq ma ini kpa…ĺu, kija k…ôsun dańßa qjuxu sn…ôgin. ¶iida d…ô mmańßa ps…ĺadiŇč tmukuj ma ¶u mnuńßitj. smn…ôgun ńßa…ĺi qmita qujux mosa pńßuma puqun ka s…ô…ôdiq. anu qujux so nii ka pdńß…ôdu psńßu…ĺiq dńß…ô…ĺan, knbaka na naq ka pkńß…ô…ĺu ani mmaanu. ¶iida du…ĺi moda bl…ôbiŇč sudu gi…ĺin tnkujan dańßa ma ¶u mulaal…ô du…ĺi, ki k…ôsun dańßa moda psgi…ĺin. niqan ńß…ôi qńßuni na ka sn…ôqin nii. slaqi mijan ¶iida, mosa nami mdakil qńßuni sn…ôgin maŇčan ńß…ôi na qńßuni, psaun nami ¶uqi btakan ma, maŇčal nami atak snalu ¶ida q…ĺ…ôti. m…ôlux nami k…ôsun ¶ux ! ¶ux! ¶ux ! ka m…ôtaq ¶uqi, Ňčalan nami atak na ma ńßg…ôtun mijan ka b…ôoq ńß…ôi s…ô…ôdan atak na, mtbasi, mpm…ôpan ńßa…ĺi ma, niqan ka msibus tikuńß na du…ĺi. malu puqun wa. ***-* psgi…ĺin. ¶ux ! ¶ux! ¶ux !
